name: paigy
description: Call, text, or push your phone when an agent needs input mid-task — reply by voice instead of babysitting a long-running or blocked terminal.
long_description:
Paigy is a voice inbox for AI coding agents. When an agent needs your input — mid-task, blocked, or done with something long-running — it can place an actual phone call and read the question aloud, text, push, or ring your phone with a banner, so you can reply by voice instead of babysitting a terminal.

Without Paigy, a long agent session means one of two bad options: sit and watch the terminal so you don't miss the moment it needs you, or walk away and come back to a task that stalled an hour ago waiting on a question you never saw. Paigy closes that gap — the moment your agent actually needs a decision, your phone gets pulled into the loop with the level of urgency that matches the moment, so you find out immediately instead of on your next check-in. It also pairs with the native Paigy iOS app, so a call rings through like a real phone call (CallKit) even when your phone is locked.

paigy_agent.title: Agent label
paigy_agent.description: Label shown on Paigy notifications for this agent (defaults to "mcp-agent" if left blank).
